title: Pack of 2 Oasis Foam Wreath Rings 12" (31cm)
features: Sold in a pack of 2 Wreath rings
5cm depth of Oasis Brand Floral Foam
Used to create sympathy tributes, table designs and gift arrangements.
description: Oasis wreath rings can be used to create sympathy tributes, table designs and gift arrangements. Competitively priced, easy to use, cut and ribbon. Typical uses include Christmas decorations, table decorations, gift arrangements and funeral tributes. Wide choice of sizes. Foam frames design frames are a range of cut shapes made from wetable floral foam bonded to a strong waterproof backing foam. Oasis foam wreath rings are the perfect platform for florists who want to show off their creative talents.
